title: Demo token accidentally committed to configuration
diffText:
diff --git a/config/application.yml b/config/application.yml
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@ integrations:
+  demoToken: DEMO_SECRET_TOKEN_SHOULD_NOT_SHIP

baselineFindings.title: Secret-like token is committed in configuration
baselineFindings.description: A demo token value is added to application.yml, which can leak credentials through source control.
baselineFindings.recommendation: Move the token to environment configuration and rotate any value that may have been exposed.
